arts.ttl: Jorginho reveals 'little thing' Bukayo Saka must fix to win Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho has backed teammate Bukayo Saka to win a Ballon d'Or in the future if the star winger can nail one of the weaker parts of his game.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Red Devils target versatile Bundesliga left-back
arts.sum: The coach spoke about the current situation around the 29-year-old's contract after his side's win over the Toffees at the weekend, saying that he does know that Shaw wants more playing time. Manchester United are preparing for a new build under Ruben Amorim and it means some of the club's longest-serving names may leave.

arts.ttl: Liverpool rivalling Arsenal for ideal potential Mohamed Salah replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are reportedly among the clubs still interested in the potential transfer of Athletic Bilbao winger Nico Williams. The Spain international has been superb in recent times, lighting up La Liga with his performances, whilst also really impressing as he helped his country win Euro 2024. arts.ttl: Manchester United and Chelsea ‘considering move’ – €80 to €100m asking price rise, Crystal Palace look out of it
arts.sum: Chelsea, Manchester United and Crystal Palace are all showing interest in Benfica’s Tomás Araújo. Crystal Palace tried to sign the defender by tabling a €30m bid in the summer but it was rejected. On November 13th, Correio da Manhã said Oliver Glasner’s side are still chasing him. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim echoing Jurgen Klopp approach in early weeks at Man Utd - 'I don't like it'
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has already endeared himself to the Old Trafford crowd after two home wins but the Manchester United boss isn't fond of one chant - just like Jurgen Klopp wasn't at Liverpool

arts.sum: Juventus are reportedly eyeing up a number of defensive transfer targets, including one of their former players in Tottenham’s Radu Dragusin. The 22-year-old spent five years on the books at Juve as a youngster, but only made four first-team appearances for the club before moving on. Tottenham ready to sign South American star!
